strengths: Strong distributed-systems and high-throughput backend background from Sociomantic (microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second, low-latency async I/O)
Broad polyglot technical range across embedded, mobile, web, and backend, with current hands-on work on MCP-based agentic frameworks and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
Fintech-adjacent exposure through RIDE Capital and Optilyz pricing optimization, demonstrating familiarity with product environments that carry business consequence
concerns: No evidence of engineering leadership or people management across a 17-year career — every role is individual contributor or solo founder; the position requires scaling teams from 10 to 30+ and developing a senior technical leadership layer

AI and agentic-systems experience is limited to two months at the current employer and described in broad terms; no production multi-agent systems operating under financial or regulatory risk are documented
No demonstrated depth in fintech infrastructure — credit systems, payment flows, real-time risk, or compliance across jurisdictions — which is the core domain of the role

key_factors.factor: Agentic AI experience recency and shallowness
Distributed systems and real-time backend depth

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically capable senior individual contributor with credible distributed-systems experience and nascent agentic-tooling exposure, but his profile does not meet the executive requirements of this role on its most critical dimensions: there is no record of engineering management, team scaling, architectural governance, or organizational leadership at any stage of a 17-year career; agentic AI work is limited to approximately two months at one employer; and the fintech domain expertise the role depends on — credit risk, working-capital management, real-time regulatory compliance — is largely absent from his background.
